title: Little Yam Mango.
content:
Little Yam Mango
        Has beautiful eyes,
    Also the brightest
        Of scarlet neckties.

    Little Yam Mango
        Will never go out;
    Being so lazy,
        He's grown very stout.
meaning:
"Little Yam Mango." is a quintessential example of Richard Hunter's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
